audit_items.proof_trace: raxRecursiveFree performs depth-first traversal: all child pointers are read from node `n` while `n` is still alive (loop L1225-1230), free_callback(raxGetData(n)) is called before rax_free(n) at L1232-1234, and rax->numnodes-- accesses the live rax struct (not a freed node). Each node is visited exactly once (tree structure has no shared-node cycles), so no double-free occurs. raxFreeWithCallback frees the rax struct only after raxRecursiveFree returns, with no post-free dereferences.
